top_signals.title: Shipping Costs Spike Amidst Iran War Anxiety
top_signals.summary: The cost of shipping a container of goods from Asia to the United States has doubled since the start of the Iran war, driven by spiking fuel prices and an uptick in demand from importers who are worried costs will only rise further as the conflict…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Trump keeps saying an Iran deal is close. Markets keep believing it
top_signals.summary: Analysts still assume that, despite the continued conflict, a deal will eventually be reached that ends the war and reopens the Strait of Hormuz.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Trump Threatens to Attack Iran, Claims Oil Has Been Transported Through Hormuz
top_signals.summary: U.S. President Donald Trump said on Wednesday that the United States will attack Iran if no peace deal is secured and that the U.S. military secretly escorted ships carrying more than 100 million barrels of oil out of the Strait of Hormuz."We're going to be attacking them…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: SpaceX Price Tag is 'Very Steep': Renaissance's Kennedy
top_signals.summary:
Matt Kennedy, senior strategist at Renaissance Capital joins Matt Miller on "Bloomberg Deals." SpaceX is offering 555.6 million shares at a fixed price of $135 each, which would raise about $75 billion. The stock is set to start trading on June 12. The IPO is expected to rank as the biggest ever, topping Saudi Aramco’s $29.4 billion listing in 2019.
 (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Trump says U.S. secretly moved more than 100 million barrels of oil through Strait of Hormuz
top_signals.summary: Trump's comments come after Energy Secretary Chris Wright said Tuesday that oil exports through Hormuz are "rising very meaningfully."
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Policy paper: Introducing the AI Economics Institute
top_signals.summary: Overview of AI Economics Institute, its role in analysing AI’s economic impacts and how it will support evidence-based policy making in the UK.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Two Vessels Under Panama, Barbados Flags Damaged in Attack in Ukrainian Waters
top_signals.summary: Two vessels under Panamanian and Barbadian flags were damaged after being attacked while moving through Ukraine's Black Sea navigation corridor, the Ukrainian Ports Authority said on Wednesday.The authority, writing on Telegram, said one vessel was headed for the port of Odesa…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: EU to protect industries from future carbon costs if they invest in the bloc
top_signals.summary: Brussels weighs scheme to provide free emission allowances beyond the existing 2039 schedule
